behaviors.behavior: Middle card renders prose paragraphs, not an activity list
behaviors.evidence: client OperationLive.test.tsx > renders paragraphs of prose, not a list of activity lines

behaviors.behavior: The retired six-line window leaves no .mc-hero-line behind
behaviors.evidence: client OperationLive.test.tsx > renders paragraphs of prose (negative assertion)
client narrator-facts.test.ts > takes the operator's request from the kickoff arguments

behaviors.behavior: Leading CLI flags stripped; value-flags consume their value; `--` ends stripping
behaviors.evidence: client narrator-facts.test.ts > strips leading CLI flags / stops flag stripping at `--`

behaviors.behavior: Harness injections are never narrated as something a person said
behaviors.evidence: client narrator-facts.test.ts > never narrates harness injections as something a person said

behaviors.behavior: A failure COUNT is read only from recognised test output
behaviors.evidence: client narrator-facts.test.ts > reads a real failure COUNT from recognised output

behaviors.behavior: is_error alone never becomes a failure count
behaviors.evidence: client narrator-facts.test.ts > an is_error with NO parseable count does not invent one

behaviors.behavior: A counted pass may claim the whole suite; an uncounted one may not
behaviors.evidence: client narrator-prose.test.ts > a COUNTED pass may claim the whole suite

behaviors.behavior: A tool call with no result yet is pending, never success
Reads/searches aggregate into counts; no per-step line, no filenames
behaviors.evidence: client narrator-prose.test.ts > tells the arc of a real run; e2e asserts no filename appears

behaviors.behavior: An inline link resolves to a rail node, else renders as plain text
behaviors.evidence: client narrator-prose.test.ts > emits NO link when the rail has no such node

behaviors.behavior: An inline link is a real <button type=button>, keyboard-activatable
behaviors.evidence: client OperationLive.test.tsx > a link span is a real button / is reachable by keyboard

behaviors.behavior: No duration or elapsed time appears anywhere in the narration
behaviors.evidence: client narrator-prose.test.ts > never emits a time unit; e2e negative regex

behaviors.behavior: An empty transcript keeps the honest waiting line
Command heads are quote-aware (escapes, mixed quoting, unclosed quote)
behaviors.evidence: client stage-markers.test.ts > separator INSIDE a quoted argument / quoting edge cases

behaviors.behavior: A slash command carrying <command-args> is classified as one and carries args
Narrative window: 4 anchor rules, ask recovery, completed-run verdict+story stack
behaviors.evidence: client narrator-facts.test.ts (7 tests) + MissionBody.test.tsx > COMPLETED run

test_completeness.enumeration_basis: The 12 acceptance criteria of .shipwright/planning/iterate/2026-07-21-mission-narrative-prose.md (AC1-AC10 plus AC3b and AC7b), each split where it carries more than one observable behaviour. 17 behaviours, all tested.

surface_verification.justification: UI behaviour change plus two parser/derivation fixes that only manifest end-to-end, so surface=web. Real Chromium against an isolated single-process stack (temp USERPROFILE, SHIPWRIGHT_E2E_ISOLATED=1, built client via SHIPWRIGHT_STATIC_DIR, Hono 127.0.0.1:3849, SHIPWRIGHT_NETWORK_PROFILE=local). NEW client/e2e/flows/mission-narrative-prose.spec.ts: 3/3 passed — the prose arc incl. the failure->recovery outcome, the quoted-tool-name honesty case, the pending run, and the inline artifact link. Pre-existing mission specs re-run as the regression gate: mission-live-jsonl.spec.ts, mission-artifacts-s4.spec.ts, A12-mission-operation.spec.ts = 7/8 passed. The single failure (A12 'the proof summary is NOT the terminal') waits for the EMBEDDED TERMINAL's data-ws-ready and fails with pty_spawn_failed code 5 in the Hono log — the documented environmental ACCESS_DENIED of an isolated stack, on a surface this diff does not touch.
